summary.goal: Implement battle computation service with turn loop, type effectiveness, and fault-tolerant queue processing (closes #13)
decisions: battle service runs as an asyncio background task inside the FastAPI process rather than a separate container — avoids docker-compose changes while still demonstrating queue-based separation of concerns
used asyncio.to_thread for _process_battle so blocking MongoEngine calls don't freeze the event loop during computation
lock is refreshed on every turn (not just at pickup) so a long battle doesn't drop the lock mid-computation and get claimed by a second worker
